prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for a marathon with a 20 km long run scheduled for afternoon, requiring high carbohydrate intake and strategic meal timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and pre/post-workout snacks
Total daily carbohydrate intake supports endurance training (approximately 8-10g per kg body weight)
Pre-long run meal consumed 2-3 hours before afternoon training session
Post-workout nutrition included within 30-60 minutes after training completion
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around long training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass with caloric surplus for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Each meal contains at least 30g protein with total daily protein exceeding 170g
Total daily calories are in 500+ calorie surplus (approximately 3200-3400 calories)
Meals are practical and concise with brief preparation descriptions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein distribution across meals and caloric surplus for muscle building

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for competitive soccer match day

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 4-5 eating occasions (breakfast, pre-match meal, match-day snacks, post-match recovery meal, dinner)
Macronutrient balance supports soccer performance: adequate carbohydrates for energy, protein for muscle recovery, healthy fats, and hydration strategy included
Meals are practical and digestible for match-day consumption, with timing appropriate for pre-match (2-3 hours before) and post-match recovery
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (soccer player) requiring balanced macronutrients with emphasis on recovery, hydration, and performance during competitive match day
